Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
2.8.1 Seeing where you can go - exits from the current location
(See
HELP
BASE
COMMANDS
)
Use the
command
X
or
EXITS
to get a list of the exits available and visible to
you from your current location. Exits may or may not have
doors
, which may be
closed and/or locked. Exits may also be hidden, or require certain special
activities to operate.
X or EXITS provides part of the same information usually available to you when
you enter a location or type
LOOK
or QL. Only the final line(s) relating to
exits are shown, though.
Exits may not visible to you due to
weather
conditions.
(See HELP BASE COMMANDS)
Achaea is developed and published by
Iron Realms Entertainment.
